purpose: Track backup discipline before real-time cloud sync.

fields.reviewedAt: ISO datetime when user reviewed backup discipline.
fields.score: Backup discipline score at review time.
fields.updatedAt: ISO datetime when local status was updated.

policy: Export local Backup JSON after major local data changes.
Upload Cloud Seed only after local backup exists.
Before restore, review cloud-vs-local data and create pre-restore backup.
Do not enable real-time sync until backup and hardening gates are stable.
